title: • Design audience OS layer and naming schema.
content:
• Design audience OS layer and naming schema.

  • Implementation (Weeks 11–16)
  • Configure dev/test environments and performance pipeline.
  • Simulate touring workflows and build an audience-controlled performance engine.

  • Milestones:
  • Week 4: Contextual Awareness Subsystem specification complete.
  • Week 6: Secure and tested relay system finalized.
  • Week 10: Draft architecture and audience protocol approved.
  • Week 16: Prototype demonstrating rotating bands and audience-driven influence delivered.
